transcript.final_response:
Generated `/app/.env`:

```env
DB_HOST=db.prod.internal
DB_PORT=5432
DB_NAME=myapp
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379
LOG_LEVEL=warn
```
tool_calls:
set -euo pipefail
printf '--- template ---\n'
cat /config/template.env
printf '\n--- overrides ---\n'
cat /config/overrides.txt

set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /app
: > /app/.env
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
  if [[ "$line" =~ ^([^=]+)=\$\{[^:}]+:-([^}]*)\}$ ]]; then
    key="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
    default="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
    if override_line=$(grep -m1 -E "^${key}=" /config/overrides.txt 2>/dev/null); then
      value="${override_line#*=}"
    else
      value="$default"
    fi
    printf '%s=%s\n' "$key" "$value" >> /app/.env
  fi
done < /config/template.env
cat /app/.env

ls -l /app/.env; od -c /config/template.env | head; bash --version | head -1
while IFS= read -r line; do echo "LINE:[$line]"; if [[ "$line" =~ ^([^=]+)=\$\{[^:}]+:-([^}]*)\}$ ]]; then echo match "${BASH_REMATCH[1]}" "${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"; else echo no; fi; done < /config/template.env

set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /app
: > /app/.env
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
  key="${line%%=*}"
  default="${line#*:-}"
  default="${default%?}"
  value="$default"
  while IFS= read -r oline || [[ -n "$oline" ]]; do
    [[ -z "$oline" ]] && continue
    okey="${oline%%=*}"
    if [[ "$okey" == "$key" ]]; then
      value="${oline#*=}"
      break
    fi
  done < /config/overrides.txt
  printf '%s=%s\n' "$key" "$value" >> /app/.env
done < /config/template.env
cat /app/.env

  default="${line#*:-}"
  default="${default%\}}"
  value="$default"
  while IFS= read -r oline || [[ -n "$oline" ]]; do
    [[ -z "$oline" ]] && continue
    okey="${oline%%=*}"
    if [[ "$okey" == "$key" ]]; then
      value="${oline#*=}"
      break
    fi
  done < /config/overrides.txt
  printf '%s=%s\n' "$key" "$value" >> /app/.env
done < /config/template.env
cat /app/.env

line='DB_PORT=${DB_PORT:-5432}'
default="${line#*:-}"
echo "a=[$default]"
default="${default%\}}"
echo "b=[$default]"
default2="${line#*:-}"
default2="${default2%?}"
echo "c=[$default2]"

while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do

  key="${line%%=*}"
  default=$(printf '%s\n' "$line" | sed -E 's/^[^=]+=\$\{[^:]+:-([^}]*)\}$/\1/')
  value="$default"
  while IFS= read -r oline || [[ -n "$oline" ]]; do

    if [[ "$okey" == "$key" ]]; then
      value="${oline#*=}"
      break
    fi
  done < /config/overrides.txt
  printf '%s=%s\n' "$key" "$value" >> /app/.env
done < /config/template.env
cat /app/.env
